prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: X-RAY CRYSTAL STRUCTURE OF YEAST RNA TRIPHOSPHATASE IN COMPLEX WITH A SULFATE ION.. Entity description: MRNA TRIPHOSPHATASE CET1. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. hydrophobic_density=0.369775. mean_interface=0.251052. max_segment_membrane_density=0.488095
